title: physurus major
intro: Physurus major, also known as the Large-leaved or Red-flowered Bitter Apple, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relieving fever, reducing swelling, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Physurus major are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
